achievements.description: Defeat the final Champion and complete the "Champion" main quest

achievements.description: Meet a mysterious person and complete the "Post Game?" main quest

achievements.title: Research Assistant
achievements.description: Collect data for 15 Pokémon in the Pokédex and complete the "Collector" main quest

achievements.description: Collect data for 100 Pokémon in the Pokédex and complete the "Collector +" main quest

achievements.description: Collect data for 10 Shiny Pokémon in the Pokédex and complete the "Collector S" main quest

achievements.title: Legend Caretaker
achievements.description: Defeat every Elite Four Trainer with a Legendary Pokémon in your party and complete the "Collector X" main quest

achievements.title: Careful Trainer
achievements.description: Defeat the first four Gym Leaders without your Pokémon ever fainting and complete the "Care Tactics" main quest

achievements.description: Defeat all eight Gym Leaders without your Pokémon ever fainting and complete the "Smart Tactics" main quest

achievements.description: Trade a Pokémon with Mr. Randoman and complete the "Mr. Randoman" main quest

achievements.description: Spend at least $20,000 during a single visit to a Rest Stop and complete the "Shopping Spree" main quest

achievements.title: Big Seller
achievements.description: Exit a Rest Stop with at least $50,000 and complete the "Big Saver" main quest

achievements.description: Catch a Legendary Pokémon and complete the "True Legend" main quest

achievements.description: Catch a Shiny Pokémon and complete the "Shiny a Day" main quest

achievements.description: Catch a Pokémon from a Hidden Grotto and complete the "Hidden Grotto" main quest

achievements.description: Win a Pokémon Catching Contest and complete the "Poké Ball, Go!" main quest

achievements.description: Catch a Pokémon at a Honey Tree and complete the "Enticing PokéBLOCK" main quest

achievements.description: Win a battle in the Battle Simulator and complete the "Elo Climb" main quest

achievements.description: Win every single round in the Game Show and complete the "All Skill" main quest

achievements.description: Visit the lab to reunite with a friend from the past and complete the "Fateful Encounter" main quest

achievements.description: Defeat an Evil Team Leader and complete the "Blasting Off" main quest

achievements.description: Make a Dark Deal and complete the "Mankey's Paw" main quest

achievements.description: Win a run with the Doubles battle format enabled and complete the "Double Trouble" main quest

achievements.description: Win a run in Gauntlet Mode and complete the "Long Haul" main quest

achievements.description: Complete any of the 'Region Style' challenges by enabling a single Generation of trainers with a matching Pokédex and complete the "Regional Style" main quest

achievements.description: Complete all other main quests to unlock "The Final Run." and complete the "One Last Quest..." main quest
